{{Quote|Who do you think you are?|Moff Jarnek|<ref name="ANH">''[[A New Hope: The Life of Luke Skywalker]]''</ref>}}
'''Harlov Jarnek''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who governed [[Tandon sector/Legends|Tandon sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Jarnek graduated from the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval College]], and was known as a coldly efficient leader.

==Biography==
{{Quote|You're under arrest, Moff Jarnek.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="ANH" />}}
Harlov Jarnek graduated from the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval College]] and methodically worked his way up through the ranks and by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] he was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Tandon sector/Legends|Tandon sector]]. Sometime prior to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] operatives were able to insert the [[Covallon]] spy [[Dælar vuv Tertarrnek]] into his household disguised as a loyal pet. Jarnek became very fond of his new pet and kept the rebel spy by his side unaware that his "pet" was secretly feeding vital information to the Rebels.<ref name="CRO" />

Months after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Jarnek went to the planet [[Spirador]], where he owned a palace, and ensured his own personal security with a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] planetary blockade and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and armed [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]] through the building, also keeping a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] on a nearby table in his private rooms. However, [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Princess Leia Organa]] discovered his activities and sent [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] on a mission to arrest Jarnek. Skywalker's [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] got rid of the droids. A broken droid interrupted Jarnek's leisure and scared the Moff but, before Jarnek could get his blaster, Skywalker entered his room. As Jarnek was not familiar with the introducer, Skywalker introduced himself when entering, then arrested Jarnek.<ref name="ANH" />

==Personality and traits==
Jarnek was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who achieved success through a combination of hard work and ruthlessness. He was an efficient administrator and although not inherently evil would remove any obstacle in his path without hesitation or remorse. He would do whatever it took to make things run smoothly. He had a strong desire to share his success with someone else but his position and drive made him a solitary man which is why he bonded so closely with his "pet".<ref name="CRO" />

==Skills and abilities==
Jarnek was skilled at being a leader and an administrator. He had basic combat training at the Academy but years of sitting behind a desk instead of leading the front lines had made him very rusty in actual combat.<ref name="CRO" />

==Equipment==
Jarnek only carried a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]], a [[Datapad/Legends|datapad]], and a military [[Comlink/Legends|comlink]].<ref name="CRO" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jarnek was designed by [[Stephen Crane]] for ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] in [[1994]]. He was illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]].

==Appearances==
